headline: AWWA Report Finds Rising Drinking Water Infrastructure Costs and Other Needs Put Affordability at Risk
summary: A report released today by the American Water Works Association (AWWA) finds that addressing U.S. drinking water infrastructure and other critical needs will require $2.1-$2.4 trillion over the next 25 years, testing the limits of water affordability.

headline: West Virginia American Water Invests $815,000 in Huntington Infrastructure
summary: West Virginia American Water is pleased to announce an $815,000 infrastructure upgrade project on South Walnut Street in Huntington.
